execution_explanation: Little short of great execution. Bit too slow and too short
Bit too short for great execution
Very slow, very short
Too slow, too short. Form could be less robotic
Too slow, and too short of a length.
Short and body position too high
Too slow and too short
great speed, great execution. I don't mind the soul foot miss, because the control wasn't lost
Way too short, but body position is great.
Good speed, bit too short for great execution
in control, but body position should be lower for this trick
Robotic form, sketchy landing
Short and slow. Body position could be lower too.
good speed, complete obstacle, looks in control
Great speed, great execution
Confident, but just too short.
Too slow, too short
Super confident, even though not complete obstacle, but looks really good overall.
good speed, but sketcy landing
little bit off balance but looks okay.
full obstacle, great speed, good form
great speed, full obstacle, stylish reverse landing to signal control
full obstacle, controlled landing
Not full obstacle, loss of balance in the end. Landing seems forced, but not too unnatural
good form, but just too short
Short and very sketchy landing, barely counts
Shorter, slower, bit sketchy landing
too short, little bit of control loss
good speed, good control. Bit of balance loss, but not too bad.
confident, but very short
Pose should be lower, lost balance at the end
Good speed, nearly nearly full length, good form overall
Very fast, little bit unbalanced, but still very good
Really short, nearly a failed attempt
arms moving too much, not balanced enough. Other that that - great.
lost balance in the middle
full obstacle, great speed, clean landing.
full obstacle, great speed, clean landing
very stylish, controlled, but only half of the obstacle
full obstacle, but clear imbalance throughout trick. Stylish overall though.
Good body position but slow and short
Body position should be lower. Too short.
Looks like got stuck in the end. Short and slow.
pose not low enough, balance is off
could have jumped earlier, but other that that everything really good. Good position, landing clean and stylish.
Low body position, but short and slow.
Just a bit too short for a great execution.
Bit too short for great execution
Very short, and very slow
good speed, confident landing, full obstacle
Great speed but short. No jump off at the end of the obstacle too.
Stylish, but short
could be little bit faster and longer. Bit of control loss in the end.
really good speed, great position, but sketchy landing, lost control in the end.
loss of control & balance in the end. Clean, but forced landing. Great speed.
even though length is alright. Overall looks sketchy, robotic.
Good length, but lost control in the end. Almost a fall.
Quite slow and too short.
really sketchy landing, off balance
loss of speed in the end, but confident and controlled/stylish
body position a bit off. Good speed. Landing controlled,but not stylish
Little bit of balanced, but good speed, good landing
Really sketchy landing, body position too high
Too short of a length. Lost balance.
could be lower body position, but ok
off balance, but still relatively controlled. Complete obstacle
low body position, good speed, controlled landing, balanced on top
Too slow, too short.
Great speed, great execution, full obstacle
Body position should be lower. Length little bit too short. Doesn't look fully in control.
awkward landing, loss of control in the end
Too slow, too short
Just too short and slow
Too short, but confident overall, looks good.
Looks really stylish and confident. Jumped off a bit to early, left foot got stuck a little bit on landing.
stylish reverse landing to signal control, almost full obstacle. Body position for this trick should be lower
although pose could be lower, it feels controlled and fast
great speed, great execution. pose maybe could be lower, but it doesn't look unnatural as is
Really slow and short
Great pose, the only downside its the landing a bit too early
loss of control in the end
A bit unstable balance. But great length.
body position could be lower, but otherwise good
good speed, control, stylish reverse landing but arms moving a bit too much
Short and slow. Looks uncomfortable
Too short and too slow
Short due to overspin and loss of balance.
Good speed, great form
Short and slow, but great otherwise
landing a bit sketchy (single feet), but great execution otherwise.
Nearly a fall in the end
body position not low enough, but looks really confident overall.
Clean execution, just way too short
form good, but just very short
Pose could be lower and more balanced between legs, but good speed, full obstacle with stylish reverse landing.
pose should be lower, looks unbalanced at times. But good overall.
could be longer, but otherwise good
Short, slow, landing a bit sketchy
could be a bit longer
Great speed and execution.
Great speed, but too short
stylish turn back, but out of position (not on top of obstacle)
Great speed, great form, great execution
pose should be lower for this trick, but good speed, stylish reverse landing, looks controlled overall
Really short and slow. Barely counts.
great speed, looks stylish, but pose should be lower and looks unbalanced at times
not the full obstacle, but great form, speed and control
Out of position (not on top of obstacle and too much lean backwards)
full length, but need lower body position for this trick.
great form, looks stylish. A bit slow, but everything else is good.
Great control, but too short.
Short, really slow. Body position feels awkward.
Good low pose, great speed, great execution.
really good form, clean landing
good pose, good speed, but short
loss of balance in the end.
Pose should be lower, balance looks ok. I just don't like the landing, it looks awkward. can't explain it.
body position is off. Great speed though. Clear loss of balance in the end, forced landing.
single foot landing
jumped off too early
